description: A simple designed table card on a white background with columns labeled 'Code', 'Airport' and 'Max. wait time'. A single row shows a red 'IAH' tag, 'George Bush Intercontinental Airport, Houston, Texas', and '270 min.' with a timestamp 'March 23 at 4:43 p.m. ET'.
